summary: Tested Welcome promo code popup feature. All backend APIs (generate, validate, mark-used, admin/emails) working correctly. Frontend promo popup appears on car-selection page, email input and apply button work, discounted prices display with original crossed out, countdown banner shows. Admin promo-emails page accessible and shows collected data with stats.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in /app/backend/routes/promo.py: admin/emails endpoint was looking for stored token in DB instead of verifying JWT token. Changed to use jwt.decode() with proper admin role verification.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test promo codes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Promo feature fully tested and working. Backend promo API endpoints all pass. Frontend promo popup appears 800ms after vehicles load on car-selection page. localStorage keys used: promo_code, promo_expires, promo_discount, promo_email. Admin can view collected emails at /admin/promo-emails with JWT auth.

bug_fixed.issue: Admin emails endpoint was looking for stored token in admin_users collection instead of verifying JWT token
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to use jwt.decode() with SECRET_KEY and verify admin role from decoded payload
